zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，关注关键支撑
zh.content:
从当前走势看，AVAX/USD最新报6.661，价格略低于20日均线6.6768，显示短期仍处于弱势整理格局。24小时涨幅仅0.19%，反映市场观望情绪较浓，多空双方暂未形成明显突破方向。

技术指标方面，MACD值为-0.0223，仍处于零轴下方，说明空头动能尚未完全消退。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格运行结构分析，当前市场处于低位震荡阶段，短线反弹力度相对有限，趋势仍偏谨慎。

关键位置上，短期支撑关注6.61至6.60区域，该位置接近日内低点，若失守可能进一步测试6.50附近。上方阻力首先位于20日均线6.68附近，其次关注6.75至6.80区间，突破后有望改善技术面结构。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可关注6.60附近的支撑有效性进行短线低吸，但需严格设置止损。稳健投资者建议等待价格重新站稳20日均线并伴随成交量放大后再考虑跟进，以降低震荡行情中的交易风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 6.661, marginally above the session low of 6.6068 and effectively matching the daily high, indicating a market that remains range-bound but is attempting to stabilize after recent weakness. The price is currently trading slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 6.6768, suggesting that short-term momentum still favors sellers. However, the narrow trading range and modest 24-hour gain of 0.19% indicate that downside pressure may be easing rather than accelerating.

Technical indicators present a cautiously neutral-to-bearish picture. The MACD value of -0.0223 remains below the zero line, reflecting lingering negative momentum and confirming that buyers have not yet regained firm control of the trend. The absence of RSI data limits confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, making price action and moving average behavior more important. A sustained move above the SMA(20) would be an early signal that bullish momentum is beginning to rebuild.

From a support and resistance perspective, immediate support is located near 6.60, aligned with the recent intraday low. A break below this zone could expose AVAX to further weakness toward the psychological 6.50 area. On the upside, initial resistance appears around 6.68–6.70, corresponding to the SMA(20), followed by a stronger barrier near 6.80. A decisive breakout above these levels would improve the short-term outlook and could attract additional buying interest.

For traders, patience may be warranted until price confirms direction. Conservative participants may prefer to wait for a close above 6.70 before considering long exposure, targeting 6.80 and higher levels. Conversely, failure to reclaim the moving average combined with a drop below 6.60 would favor a defensive stance and could present short-term bearish opportunities. Risk management remains essential, as current conditions suggest consolidation rather than a fully established trend reversal.
